reach_why: Mostly critiques familiar search, self-evaluation, and confounding issues; little genuinely new explanatory territory is introduced.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links narrowing limits, evaluator-stability dependence, and pretraining confounds into one skeptical framework.
falsifiable_why: Claims are testable via widening-required tasks, evaluator-stability manipulations, and controls separating architecture from pretrained knowledge.
explanation: It argues the proposal may be incomplete, unstable, and empirically confounded despite seeming tractable.
